title: Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (hardcover)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:Tpmtpb.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Episode I —
The Phantom Menace'' |writer=[[Henry Gilroy]] |penciller=[[Rodolfo Damaggio]] |inker=[[Al Williamson]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[David Nestelle|Dave Nestelle]] |cover artist=*[[Gregory Manchess|Ravenwood]] {{C|Dark Horse}} *[[Mike Mayhew]] {{C|Marvel}} |editor= |publisher=*[[Dark Horse Comics]] *[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[December 8]], [[1999]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/49-075/Star-Wars-Episode-I---The-Phantom-Menace-Ltd-Ed-HC|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace Ltd. Ed. HC}} |other date=[[December 21]], [[2011]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/19-430/Star-Wars-Episode-I-The-Phantom-Menace|text=Star Wars: Episode I—The Phantom Menace}} |media type=*Hardcover *Trade paperback |pages=*122 {{C|Dark Horse}} *120 {{C|Marvel}} |isbn=9781569717318 |isbn2=9781595828415 |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] |series=[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'']] |issues=1–4 |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace''''' is the hardcover collection of all four issues of the [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (comic series)|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' comic adaptation]] series of comics. It was released [[December 8]], [[1999]]. A trade paperback reprint was released on [[December 21]], [[2011]], followed by a second hardcover edition by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[May 24]], [[2016]]. ==Publisher's summary== ===Dark Horse=== Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace ''is the seminal tale of the'' Star Wars ''mythos, unlocking the history and events that laid the foundation for the Rebel Alliance's epic struggle against the Empire as chronicled in the original'' Star Wars ''film trilogy. Featuring familiar characters as never before seen and introducing new players destined to become'' Star Wars ''icons, Episode I is a must-see film experience, and this comics adaptation is a must-read for all'' Star Wars ''enthusiasts. Adapted by Henry Gilroy from the original screenplay by master filmmaker George Lucas and illustrated by Rodolfo Damaggio and comics legend Al Williamson.'' ''On December 27, 2011 the comics were re-released by Dark Horse Comics in honor of the re-release of'' The Phantom Menace ''in 3-D.'' ===Marvel=== ''The official comic-book adaptation of the first chapter in the epic saga of ''STAR WARS''! Years before Luke Skywalker would clash with Darth Vader, turmoil has engulfed the Galactic Republic. But when a pair of Jedi Knights—Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi—are dispatched to end the trade conflict that has gripped the galaxy, they make a surprising discovery: the "chosen one" destined to bring balance to the Force—a young boy named Anakin Skywalker! But this new hope may not last long when an ancient enemy returns to threaten the Jedi after centuries in hiding. As the Sith rise again, the small planet of Naboo finds itself in the middle of a power struggle for the ages. Can Queen Padmé Amidala save her people from invasion? Collecting ''STAR WARS: EPISODE I — THE PHANTOM MENACE'' #1–4.'' ==Contents== *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 1|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 1]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 2|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 2]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 3|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 3]] *[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 4|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' 4]] ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781569717318}}; [[December 8]], [[1999]]; [[Dark Horse Comics]]; US hardcover *{{ISBN|9781595828415}}; [[December 21]], [[2011]]; Dark Horse Comics; US trade paperback *{{ISBN|9781302900748}}; [[May 24]], [[2016]]; [[Marvel Comics]]; US hardcover{{Marvel|url=comics/collection/59423/star_wars_episode_i_-_the_phantom_menace_hardcover|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace (Hardcover)}} *{{ISBN|9781302486310}}; [[May 25]], 2016; Marvel Comics; US eBook ===Cover gallery=== File:Tpmtpb.jpg|Cover File:SWEP1TPMTPB-FC.jpg|Full cover art File:SWEpisodeIThePhantomMenace-MarvelHC.jpg|Marvel Comics front cover File:SWEpisodeIThePhantomMenace-Solicitation.png|Marvel Comics solicitation cover File:SWEpisodeIThePhantomMenace-Art.jpg|Marvel Comics cover art ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|164|Blaster}} *{{InsiderCite|165|Blaster}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/19-430/Star-Wars-Episode-I-The-Phantom-Menace|text=Star Wars: Episode I—The Phantom Menace}} *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/49-075/Star-Wars-Episode-I---The-Phantom-Menace-Ltd-Ed-HC|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace Ltd.
